default.title: Initialize Express.js server
default.body: Create the main `server.js` file, instantiate an Express app, and listen on the configured port.

framework-specific.title: Set up common Express middlewares
framework-specific.body: Add essential middlewares like `cors`, `helmet` (for security), and `morgan` (for logging).

framework-specific.title: Create global error handling middleware
framework-specific.body: Implement an Express error handling middleware to catch unhandled exceptions and format API error responses.
